name: Nutty Brown Bread (Claire Latimer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 190°C, 375°F, Gas Mark 5.
2. Place all the dry ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
3. Add the egg and milk and mix well with a spoon.
4. Pour into a 1-pint non-stick loaf tin, smooth over roughly.
5. Sprinkle over the sunflower seeds (optional).
6. Bake for 45 to 60 minutes or until crisp on top and leaves a skewer clean if speared.
